name: Iran
summary: Day 69 Thursday. **MOU TEXT NOW ON THE TABLE — 14-POINT MEMORANDUM-OF-UNDERSTANDING DRAFTING WITH 48-HOUR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW (~MAY 8 EVENING).** Axios scoop May 6 (corroborated CNN/JPost/NPR/Hill/Reuters/Times of Israel/Iran International independently) reports White House and Iran closing in on a one-page 14-point MOU that would: (1) declare end-of-war; (2) Iran moratorium on uranium enrichment 12-15 years (compromise between US-demanded 20yr and Iran-offered 5yr); (3) Iran ships out HEU stockpile (custodian still TBD; Russia rejected by US, IAEA/Kazakhstan possible); (4) US lifts sanctions and releases frozen Iranian assets; (5) BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades; (6) 30-day post-signing window for detailed agreements. The 14-point MOU was originally Iran's proposal in response to a 9-point US plan (Tasnim/Xinhua/Al Jazeera May 3). Witkoff and Kushner negotiating directly with Iranian officials AND through Pakistani mediators. **Iran's posture is BIFURCATED:** FM spokesperson Baqaei (May 6): Iran 'assessing' the proposal; 'termination of war and lasting peace remain Tehran's top priorities' — conciliatory civilian-government framing; Tasnim (IRGC-aligned): 'more of a wishlist than a reality' — preserving hardline-leverage rhetoric but not calling for escalation; Press TV (English propaganda): 'Project Freedom perishes in 48 hours as Trump retreats under wall of Iran's asymmetric deterrence' — triumphalist victory-claim language that historically precedes acceptance of a deal. **Iran also signaled FIRST EXPLICIT REOPENING OFFER OF CYCLE for Hormuz** (PBS/AP/Al Jazeera): 'reopen the Strait of Hormuz if the US lifts its blockade and the war ends' — IRGC Navy added 'safe transit will be ensured with new procedures.' Operational reality lags rhetoric: 5-6 vessel transits/day vs 138 norm; CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iran, IRGC has NOT claimed). FM Araghchi arrives India May 7-8 (20th Joint Commission, 75th anniversary of India-Iran Friendship Treaty), parallel-track diplomacy with Murmu+Jaishankar while MOU drafted. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent; AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME — supreme-leader vacuum is the structural reason for IRGC/civilian factional split. Rial flat ~1.831M IRR/USD remittance (Day 5-6 stable). Trump warned 'bombing starts at significantly higher level and intensity' if no deal — rhetorical leverage paired with real diplomatic offer. Branches re-priced: kinetic ~20-25%; extended-economic-warfare ~30-35%; negotiated-resolution ~40-50% (UP sharply on MOU framework). Vali Nasr challenges as 'overclaimed'; Sadjadpour: 48hr window structurally inadequate given Mojtaba absence + Pezeshkian-IRGC split — falsifiable test by May 8 evening.

active_triggers.condition: Mojtaba Khamenei appears on video/audio (proof of life and command)
Iranian rial breaks 2,000,000/USD black market (Brooks hyperinflation thesis confirmation)
Iran's missile stockpile depleted to point of inability to sustain retaliation
Iran accepts direct talks with US (publicly acknowledged)
Iran retaliatory strike for Tangsiri assassination
Iran formally accepts/signs 14-point MOU with US (within 14 days = by 2026-05-21) — Nasr/Sadjadpour falsification test
Iran responds to MOU within Trump's 48-hour window (~by 2026-05-08 evening) with substantive acceptance vs counter-proposal/extension
Hormuz transit volume above 30 vessels/day for 3 consecutive days (operational reopening, vs current 5-6/day vs 138 norm)

recent_signals.headline: MOU FRAMEWORK CIRCULATING — 14-POINT MEMORANDUM-OF-UNDERSTANDING DRAFTED WITH 48-HOUR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW. Provisions: end-of-war declaration, 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium (compromise from 20yr-US/5yr-Iran), Iran ships out HEU stockpile (custodian TBD), US lifts sanctions and frozen assets, BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades, 30-day post-signing detail window. MOU originally Iran's proposal (response to 9-point US plan via Tasnim May 3). Witkoff+Kushner negotiating directly + via Pakistani mediators. **Iran posture bifurcated:** Baqaei (FM): 'assessing,' 'lasting peace top priority' (conciliatory civilian); Tasnim (IRGC-aligned): 'more wishlist than reality' (hardline-leverage, no escalation call); Press TV: 'Project Freedom perishes... Iran's asymmetric deterrence' (triumphalist victory framing — historically precedes deal acceptance). Trump warned 'bombing starts at significantly higher level and intensity' if no deal. Iran also signaled FIRST EXPLICIT REOPENING OFFER for Hormuz: 'reopen if US lifts blockade and war ends' (PBS/AP/Al Jazeera/IRGC Navy 'safe transit with new procedures'). FM Araghchi arrives India May 7-8 for 20th Joint Commission with Jaishankar+Murmu (75th anniversary India-Iran Friendship Treaty) — parallel-track diplomacy. CMA CGM San Antonio struck May 5 by cruise missile (CBS attribution to Iran, IRGC has NOT claimed) — kinetic-tail risk persists despite diplomatic-track pricing. Mojtaba Day 60-61 absent; AI-generated videos confirmed by TIME — supreme-leader vacuum is structural reason for Pezeshkian-IRGC factional split.
recent_signals.verification: MOU drafting = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Iran-Hormuz reopening offer = REPORTED→CONFIRMED (PBS/AP direct quotes, IRGC Navy spokesperson statement); Hormuz still operationally closed (5-6 vessels/day vs 138 norm — CONFIRMED via Strauss Center/Lloyd's List); Iran factional bifurcation = CONFIRMED (Baqaei vs Tasnim vs Press TV multi-outlet); Araghchi India visit = CONFIRMED (MEA primary); CMA CGM strike = CONFIRMED action, CLAIMED Iran attribution (single-source US officials via CBS, no Iranian claim, no independent corroboration); Mojtaba AI-generated videos = REPORTED (TIME single-source, Iran International corroborated, Iranian state has not denied)
